---
title: "Manjari Kannan"
format:
  html:
    theme: journal
    toc: true
---

# 👋 Hi, I'm Manjari

I’m a graduate student at Boston University studying Applied Business Analytics.

## PySpark Test

```{python}
print("PySpark environment is working on EC2")
```

## 🔍 Interests
- Data Analytics
- Machine Learning
- Marketing Strategy

## 📊 Projects
- EC2 setup lab  
- Data analytics work  
- Machine learning projects  

## 📫 Contact

Feel free to reach out!

- 💼 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/manjarikannan)
- ✉️ [Email](mailto:manjari.kannan@gmail.com)
